name: Another Chicken Pot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 3-quart baking dish, combine the soup, milk, thyme, and pepper. Stir in the vegetables and chicken.
2. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes or until the mixture begins to bubble. Meanwhile, cut each biscuit into quarters.
3. Remove the dish from the oven; stir. Arrange biscuit pieces over the hot chicken mixture. Bake for an additional 15 minutes or until golden brown.
VARIATION: For the last 5 minutes of baking, top with melted cheddar or Swiss cheese (grated). Turkey can be substituted for chicken. The vegetables used can include carrots, broccoli, potatoes, cauliflower, frozen, or fresh options.
